common.name: Name

hero.heading: Heal Naturally. Live Fully.
hero.subheading: Experience the power of naturopathy at Tirunelveli's trusted health and wellness center. Drug-free, holistic healing for your body, mind, and soul.

aboutPreview.heading: Natural Healing, Modern Approach
aboutPreview.description: At Owl I Health and Wellness Center, we believe in the body's innate ability to heal itself. Our naturopathy treatments combine ancient wisdom with modern techniques to provide drug-free, holistic care that addresses the root cause of ailments, not just symptoms.

servicesOverview.heading: Our Healing Services
servicesOverview.subheading: Comprehensive naturopathy treatments tailored to your unique health needs

experienced.title: Experienced BNYS Doctors
experienced.description: Our team of qualified naturopathy physicians bring years of expertise in natural healing.

natural.title: 100% Natural Treatments
natural.description: Drug-free therapies that work with your body's natural healing mechanisms.

personalized.title: Personalized Care Plans
personalized.description: Every treatment plan is customized to your individual health needs and goals.

affordable.title: Affordable Wellness
affordable.description: Quality healthcare that is accessible and affordable for every family.

testimonials.heading: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subheading: Real stories from real people who found healing through naturopathy

blogPreview.heading: Health & Wellness Blog
blogPreview.subheading: Expert insights on natural healing, nutrition, and holistic wellness

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Natural Healing Journey?
cta.subheading: Take the first step towards a healthier, drug-free life. Book your consultation today.

story.heading: Our Story
story.content: Founded in 2026, Owl I Health and Wellness Center was born from a vision to bring authentic naturopathy healthcare to the people of Tirunelveli. We believe that true healing comes from within, and our mission is to guide every patient on their journey to natural wellness.

vision.heading: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the leading naturopathy center in Tamil Nadu, making natural, drug-free healthcare accessible to all.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.content: To provide comprehensive naturopathy treatments that address the root cause of ailments, empower patients with knowledge about natural healing, and create a community of wellness.

values.heading: Our Values
values.holisticDesc: We treat the whole person — body, mind, and spirit.
values.compassionDesc: Every patient receives empathetic, personalized care.
values.excellenceDesc: We maintain the highest standards in naturopathy practice.
values.educationDesc: We empower patients with knowledge for lifelong wellness.

footer.aboutText: Owl I Health and Wellness Center is a naturopathy clinic dedicated to holistic healing through natural therapies in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu.
